sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Combo System
special_mechanics.description: Player can perform punch, kick, and throw combinations that unlock stronger moves as player progresses through levels

special_mechanics.name: Melee Combat Focus
special_mechanics.description: Hand-to-hand combat is the primary and most effective combat method; gunplay is secondary

special_mechanics.name: Multiple Enemy Classes
special_mechanics.description: Different enemy classes have distinct unarmed combat styles; each class subdivided into color-coded tiers (green/blue/red) of increasing strength

special_mechanics.name: Animation Interpolation
special_mechanics.description: Engine implements tweening of key frames to smooth complex martial-arts animations, though frame slippage occurs with multiple nearby NPCs

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Available source is Wikipedia article focused on narrative, development, and gameplay features rather than precise physics parameters. No technical movement data, gravity values, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system details are documented. Oni is primarily described as a melee-combat action game with interpolated animations.
